subject: Re: [External]Following up from Chamber Connections
body:
Good Morning Duncan,

Great to hear from you.

It would be my pleasure.  I have availability on Tuesday June 2nd any time after 9:00 AM.  Let me know what works for you.  Also, if you'd like to meet up, I'd be happy to do that as well.

Regards.

DATA CLASSIFICATION | CONFIDENTIAL

Louis Eisenberg
